newsSince: No fresh fundamental news since June 9 — continued momentum re-rating: VPG hit a new all-time high on June 17 (~+33.6% in one month, +244% YTD), driven by the standing humanoid-robotics/physical-AI picks-and-shovels narrative (Q1 book-to-bill 1.21, $1.0M humanoid orders booked, a fourth developer in early engineering talks). The fundamental story is unchanged from the May Q1 print; the move is crowding/sentiment, not new catalysts.

sources.label: VPG hits new all-time high (Benzinga, Jun)
VPG benefiting from robotics growth (Insider Monkey/Yahoo)

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha-vs-passives lens: VPG made a new ATH Jun 17 (+33.6%/mo), but on no new fundamentals beyond the May Q1 humanoid story. Crowding keeps eroding residual alpha on this crowding-sensitive list; small negative drift, consistent with the prior 'rerated benchmark' bucket. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Profitable physical-AI/humanoid picks-and-shovels; book-to-bill 1.21, manufacturing rebound, multiple humanoid developers engaging.
verdicts.neutral: Real but tiny humanoid revenue ($1.0M booked); thesis intact yet fully recognized after +244% YTD.
verdicts.bear: +244% YTD prices in years of humanoid hope; any sentiment reversal de-rates a small-cap fast — residual alpha nearly gone.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Humanoid orders scaling materially (multiple developers moving from engineering to volume).
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding/momentum unwind; humanoid revenue stays immaterial relative to the multiple.

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens: force/current-sensing relevant to hands and balance and the developer pipeline grew, but it's the same Q1 narrative — no new fundamental catalyst since Jun 9, just a new ATH. Prior verdict already moved it down for crowding/rerating; respect and hold.
verdicts.bull: Force-sensing is core to humanoid hands/balance; engaged with multiple humanoid OEMs as the segment begins scaling later in 2026.
verdicts.neutral: Genuine robotics exposure but humanoid revenue still nominal; valuation captures the optionality.
verdicts.bear: Already capitulated upward; force-sensing faces alternatives and the AI-robotics premium is fragile at this multiple.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Conversion of humanoid engineering engagements into scaled production orders.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Humanoid timelines slip; rich valuation unwinds on any robotics-hype cooling.
